secondary_archetype: Technical PM (API/infrastructure products, early-stage startup context)

level_signals: 6+ years of product management or product-focused founder experience
Expected to set product strategy, own business metrics, and represent externally with VCs/partners
Drive execution, own delivery of product and business metrics

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6+ years of product management or product-focused founder experience.
Shipped user-facing or API products, built on complex technical systems running at scale.
An AI enthusiast and experimenter. Someone who is willing to upend their workflows for something that works 2x better.
Passion for helping founders build their businesses.
Persistence and a whatever-it-takes approach to ensure that your product is successful.
Strong written and verbal communication skills with a talent for precise articulations of customer problems.
Adept with data and confident in how best to measure user impact.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Founder background, or experience in a very early stage company environment.
Software engineering experience, a computer science or engineering degree, or similar technical experience.

scope.surface: Stripe Atlas and other startup products helping founders form companies, raise capital, execute legal agreements, access tools, and automate operations
scope.business_model: B2B / B2B2C fintech platform — startup-focused product within Stripe's financial infrastructure
primary_metrics_inferred: Number of startups formed / reaching product-market fit
Product and business metrics for startup products
core_responsibilities: Deeply understand the needs of startup founders and learn how they use Atlas and other startup products
Stay at the front of the ever changing technology landscape
Drive product development in collaboration with engineering counterparts
Craft product experiences that are both simple and powerful
Contribute to product strategy and own delivery of product and business metrics
Work collaboratively with internal stakeholders and deliver clear communication
Represent Atlas externally with founders, venture capitalists, accelerators, and partners
Develop and maintain metrics to help understand product performance
Ensure that every user has a great experience with Atlas

green_flags: Clear product surface with concrete product name (Stripe Atlas) and real user base
Mission-driven team with explicit focus on helping founders globally
High ownership and high-agency team culture explicitly stated
Encourages candidates who meet only minimum requirements to apply
External-facing role with exposure to VCs, accelerators, and startup ecosystem
red_flags: No location information provided — work arrangement (remote/hybrid/onsite), cities, and visa sponsorship are all unclear
Posting dates not available — unclear how fresh the role is
